meaning: v.做蠢事,将棒球打到内外野之间
examples: Lobster genie and Bloop played happily together.
Well, if you do, then you would know that Bloop wished for a friend.
There once was a fish named Bloop. When he talked he made a bloopy noise.
Coglan followed with a bloop double to score Ozuna for an early 3-0 lead.
Derek Dietrich doubled to start the seventh for the Marlins and Ozuna followed with a bloop single.
